chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-104 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection (s) 2. For orders on M.A No.1809/2026 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on M.A No.1810/2026 02.04.2026 None has appeared on behalf of the applicant. No intimation is received. The same was the case on the last date of hearing. The report submitted by the Bailiff indicates that notice has already been affected. In these circumstances, it appears that the applicant is no longer interested in pursuing this matter. Accordingly, the application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
